page_content:
AAAS499 Advanced Topics in Public Policy and the Black Community (3 Credits) Examination of speciﬁc areas of policy development and evaluation in black and other communities. Application of advanced tools of policy analysis, especially quantitative, statistical and micro-economic analysis. Prerequisite: AASP301 or AAAS301; or permission of BSOS-African American and Africana Studies department. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
